source.title: What Happens If a Fleet Is Rented Without Fuel or Ammo?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What Happens If a Fleet Is Rented Without Fuel or Ammo?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Borrowers must check fuel, ammo, and crew before renting.
If a fleet is left in deep space without fuel, you must self-destruct it to bring it back to your faction CSS, so pay attention to the fleet's location before renting.
